semantic.role: Configuration resolution utility for the pre-commit setting, determining its boolean value from environment variables or explicit parameters.
responsibilities: Resolves the pre-commit boolean setting by checking the environment variable defined by PRE_COMMIT_ENV_VAR using parseBooleanEnv.
Returns a structured BooleanSettingResolution object indicating the resolved value, source ('env'), and the environment variable name.
Provides a fallback pattern where an explicit preCommit parameter could be used (though not fully shown in snippet, implied by function signature).
outOfScope: Providing infrastructure facades or low-level capabilities
Handling runtime business logic beyond configuration resolution
invariants: Pure function with no side effects
Depends only on environment utilities and type definitions

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Encapsulate environment-based configuration resolution to promote consistency and testability across the codebase.
